author: Viggo Meesters
description: Browse .json, .jsonl, and .ndjson files as a read-only tree with search, outline navigation, and syntax-highlighted source. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Viggo Meesters
manifest.description: Browse .json, .jsonl, and .ndjson files as a read-only tree with search, outline navigation, and syntax-highlighted source.
manifest.name: JSON Viewer

name: JSON Viewer

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description:
Patch release.

- Harden raw source tokenization to avoid community review regex warnings.
- Keep JSON/JSONL viewer behavior unchanged.

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description:
Initial public release.

- Read-only viewer for .json, .jsonl, and .ndjson files
- Tree view with filter/search and outline navigation
- JSONL/NDJSON record parsing with per-line errors
- Raw source with lightweight syntax highlighting
- Copy raw JSON and JSON Pointer paths
